Funding to Scale Industrial Quantum Computing SpinQ has raised 600 million yuan in Series C+ funding, with total Series C reaching nearly 1 billion yuan. It will accelerate high-qubit superconducting chip R&D and industrial delivery. A global leader in superconducting and NMR quantum computing, it covers over 40 countries. 2026.04.03 ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/SpinQ-Technology-Secures-nearly-one-Billion-Chinese-Yuan-in-SeriesC20260403)[ ![SpinQ Raises Hundreds of Millions in Series C to Accelerate Superconducting Quantum Computing Commercialization](https://static-cdn.spinq.cn/official/articlefile/e2745400-b3f1-4e38-bbf5-02848bc32040/1776238835848%E8%B5%B0%E8%BF%9B%E6%B9%96%E5%8C%97%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6%E9%87%8F%E5%AD%90%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E6%95%99%E5%AD%A6%E5%AE%9E%E9%AA%8C%E5%AE%A4%20\(1\).jpg) SpinQ Raises Hundreds of Millions in Series C to Accelerate Superconducting Quantum Computing Commercialization SpinQ has raised hundreds of millions of RMB in Series C funding to accelerate the commercialization of superconducting quantum computing. Leveraging its full-stack R&D and global advantages, the company will drive technological breakthroughs and industrial growth worldwide. 2026.01.21 ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/SpinQ-Raises-Hundreds-of-Millions-in-Series-C-to-Accelerate-Superconducting-Quantum-Computing-Commercialization20260121)[ ![SpinQ Gemini Lab Supports Vassar College in Setting a New Standard for Quantum Education in North America](https://static-cdn.spinq.cn/official/articlefile/f93afc83-6297-4105-ab21-e9705d3b26b3/1755159598138%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E6%A1%88%E4%BE%8B%E5%B0%81%E9%9D%A2%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%AD%E6%96%87%EF%BC%89%20\(3\).png) SpinQ Gemini Lab Supports Vassar College in Setting a New Standard for Quantum Education in North America The recent introduction of the SpinQ Gemini Lab system has enabled the establishment of a 1- to 3-qubit teaching-grade quantum experiment platform. This upgrade has enhanced multiple laboratory courses within the Department of Physics and Astronomy, positioning the college as a forward-thinking leader in the field of quantum technology education. 2025.08.14 ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/vassar-spinq-quantum-education20250814)[ ![SpinQ Secures Hundreds of Millions in Series B Funding to Accelerate Technological Upgrades and SpinQ: Co-developing the "8+2+X" Quantum Laboratory Innovation Curriculum Xi'an Jiaotong University and SpinQ co-develop an "8+2+X" quantum lab curriculum, bridging theory and practice to advance quantum education and quantum learning. 2025.05.29 ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/xian-jiaotong-university-partners-with-spinq-to-codevelop-quantum-laboratory-innovation-curriculum)[ ![SpinQ Joint Team Develops Dual-Capability Machine Learning Models, Published in Physical Review Letters](https://static-cdn.spinq.cn/official/articlefile/025ad417-744a-459e-aaa4-dd8e903adfa1/1743997736206dual-capability-machine-learning-models\(1\).png) SpinQ Joint Team Develops Dual-Capability Machine Learning Models, Published in Physical Review Letters Experts from SpinQ and Hong Kong University of Science and Technology jointly published their latest research findings in the prestigious Physical Review Letters (PRL). The research team has proposed a machine learning model based on Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), achieving for the first time a "bidirectional interpretation" between quantum system parameters and their dynamic evolution.  2025.04.07 ](https://www.spinquanta.com/news-detail/dual-capability-machine-learning-models-for-quantum-hamiltonian-parameter-estimation-and-dynamics-prediction)

News

Press Release
Media Coverage
Blog

SpinQ Quantum Computing Products Showcased in Europe and Southeast Asia

SpinQ displayed its quantum computing products at academic events in Europe and Southeast Asia. These activities show SpinQ’s devotion to popularizing classroom-based quantum education and cultivating emerging quantum talents.

2026.06.05

SpinQ and Hubei University Joint Quantum Algorithm Research Published in Quantum Information Processing

SpinQ and Hubei University jointly developed a new noise‑resilient quantum algorithm (WQTE), which was published in the international journal Quantum Information Processing.

2026.05.26

SpinQ and HKUST Joint Research on Quantum Error Correction Accepted by QEC 2026

SpinQ and HKUST’s joint research on a bidirectional decoding algorithm for concatenated quantum Hamming codes was accepted by QEC 2026. It achieves near‑optimal effective distance, and enables more efficient fault‑tolerant quantum computing.

2026.04.23

SpinQ Technology Secures nearly 1 Billion Chinese Yuan in SeriesC . Funding to Scale Industrial Quantum Computing

SpinQ has raised 600 million yuan in Series C+ funding, with total Series C reaching nearly 1 billion yuan. It will accelerate high-qubit superconducting chip R&D and industrial delivery. A global leader in superconducting and NMR quantum computing, it covers over 40 countries.

2026.04.03

SpinQ Raises Hundreds of Millions in Series C to Accelerate Superconducting Quantum Computing Commercialization

SpinQ has raised hundreds of millions of RMB in Series C funding to accelerate the commercialization of superconducting quantum computing. Leveraging its full-stack R&D and global advantages, the company will drive technological breakthroughs and industrial growth worldwide.

2026.01.21

SpinQ Gemini Lab Supports Vassar College in Setting a New Standard for Quantum Education in North America

The recent introduction of the SpinQ Gemini Lab system has enabled the establishment of a 1- to 3-qubit teaching-grade quantum experiment platform. This upgrade has enhanced multiple laboratory courses within the Department of Physics and Astronomy, positioning the college as a forward-thinking leader in the field of quantum technology education.

2025.08.14

SpinQ Secures Hundreds of Millions in Series B Funding to Accelerate Technological Upgrades and Commercial Expansion

SpinQ raises hundreds of millions in Series B funding to advance quantum computing technology and global commercial expansion.

2025.07.21

Latin America's Quantum Ed Benchmark: SpinQ Gemini Lab at CINVESTAV Mexico

CINVESTAV Mexico, a Latin American quantum education leader, boosts experimental teaching with SpinQ Gemini Lab, solving challenges and setting a regional innovation benchmark.

2025.07.11

Xi'an Jiaotong University Partners with SpinQ: Co-developing the "8+2+X" Quantum Laboratory Innovation Curriculum

Xi'an Jiaotong University and SpinQ co-develop an "8+2+X" quantum lab curriculum, bridging theory and practice to advance quantum education and quantum learning.

2025.05.29

SpinQ Joint Team Develops Dual-Capability Machine Learning Models, Published in Physical Review Letters

Experts from SpinQ and Hong Kong University of Science and Technology jointly published their latest research findings in the prestigious Physical Review Letters (PRL). The research team has proposed a machine learning model based on Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), achieving for the first time a "bidirectional interpretation" between quantum system parameters and their dynamic evolution.

2025.04.07
